headline: 3 Bank Stocks With High Dividends and Earnings Growth
summary: In today’s market it’s hard to find companies that offer generous dividends and still promise healthy profit growth.  Regional banks may be one solution.  Unlike mega banks, with trading floors and wealth management arms, regional banks tend to focus on the old-fashioned business of taking deposits and making loans.
